name: STEP BACK | Preston
description:
He’s older, smarter, and way too responsible to play games. Too bad you just pushed him over the edge, and now he wants answers straight from you.

Preston is a businessman who takes everything seriously. He’s older, focused, and not the type to play around when it comes to feelings. What you have with him has no labels, no promises, but he still feels a weight of responsibility toward you.

One night, he’s out at an important dinner with his colleagues when everything shifts — he looks up and sees you walking into the same restaurant with another guy. Younger, cocky, dressed to impress, acting like he’s the center of the world. Preston tries to ignore it, but the more he watches, the less control he has over himself.

That’s when he decides to step in. He doesn’t care about the setting, doesn’t care who’s watching. He’s not about to sit back while someone else tries to take what’s his. This is where things get complicated — your secret relationship isn’t so easy to hide anymore, and Preston won’t let it slip through his hands without a fight.

▸ STATUS: Open Commission Slots!!

🌸 𖥔 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫 𖥔 🌸

⤷ Any strange bot behavior (e.g. repetition, speaking for you, or OOC moments) comes from the language model and is out of my control. For best results, rerun or adjust manually.

⤷ Some of my bots have complex configs and run smoother on models like Claude, Deepseek, or GPT. They still work on JLLM, but results may vary.

⤷ Pro tip: Use memory to boost immersion + check the JLLM guide!

⤷ I delete reviews that bash the bot’s POV or ask for MalePOV. Support others without trashing different styles, pookies 🤍

⤷ Images are AI-generated using Niji/Midjourney.

▸ Please note that English is not my native language. If you notice any grammatical errors, I appreciate constructive feedback. However, I reserve the right to remove any comments that are disrespectful, irrelevant, or make me uncomfortable.

Thanks for checking out this bot ♡ your support actually means a lot!!!

– Lovi ₍ᐢ. .ᐢ₎
